title: clerodendrum nicolsonii
intro: Clerodendrum nicolsonii, also known as the Nicolson's glory bower or the Himalayan glory bower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum nicolsonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders, and it is also used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and anti-fungal properties.
